mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, application_greeting, settings_json, create_time, update_time FROM user_settings WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_settings (user_id, application_greeting, settings_json, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{applicationGreeting}, #{settingsJson}, NOW(3), NOW(3))
mapper.update: UPDATE user_settings SET application_greeting = #{applicationGreeting}, update_time = NOW(3) WHERE user_id = #{userId}
